reaction_characterization.notes: Reaction-based timings include human response delay. Use these as bench-tuning targets until video-based pedal contact and release timings are captured.

notes.current_setup: The runtime now supports four daisy-chained PCA9685 boards as one 64-channel global space. The current saved note map still uses one chromatic octave, C3 through B3, on global channels 0 through 11.
notes.wiring_assumption: Global channels 0 through 15 live on PCA9685 address 0x40, 16 through 31 on 0x41, 32 through 47 on 0x42, and 48 through 63 on 0x43.
notes.future_setup: As more solenoids are added, extend the note mapping or save a calibrated_mapping.json file. Songs can then be limited to the currently installed note range.
